svg.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.text: FedProspect navigation redesign — what the MAIN CONTENT looks like
Tier-1 destination (Dashboard) vs Tier-2 hub (Pipeline). Design mockup only — not the live app.
Click “Dashboard” → a destination (just a page, no tabs)

g.text: No tab strip — a destination is just a page

svg.text: Click “Pipeline” → a hub (one nav item → a page with tabs)

g.text: ↑ these used to be separate sidebar rows
HUB = one sidebar item that opens a page whose TABS are the tools that used to be separate sidebar rows (Pipeline)
— same pattern as the existing Opportunity detail tabs.
